answer:
Pylon AI API access is pay-per-request and does not feature a traditional free tier or subscription model [1][2]. Every API request requires a micropayment in USDC on the Base blockchain using the x402 protocol; there are no accounts, API keys, or minimum spend requirements [1][3].

Note that Pylon Cloud, a separate service for self-hosting or deploying applications, does offer a Hobby tier that is free of charge [4]. This tier includes specific quotas such as 100,000 requests per month and limited CPU/memory resources [4].

results.title: Pylon — The Action Layer for AI Agents
